series_metadata.series_description: Report of safety and sanitation inspection of DRC facility locations. DRC Form(s):#1256 Monthly Food Service Sanitation Report, #1257 Fire/Safety/Sanitation Monthly Inspection Report, #1396 Fire/Safety/Sanitation - Weekly Inspection Report, #1495 Weekly Food Service Sanitation Report.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: three years (current audit cycle) ; Electronic: three years (current audit cycle)
